opinion.h2: Edgar Percy LEWIS et al., petitioners, v. Marshall S. REYNOLDS, Individually and as Collector of Internal Revenue. No. 115.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: In this cause it is ordered that the following words be deleted from the sixth paragraph, of the opinion announced on January 4, 1932:
'Also that at the time of his last decision he was restricted to consideration of the demand for refund and determination of whether the trustees were entitled to deduct the State inheritance taxes.'
Otherwise the opinion will stand as heretofore announced.[ Lewis v. Reynolds (1932) ]
